data.title: Floor & Decor opens new store in Winston-Salem, NC with 35 full-time, 15 part-time associates at 3925 Oxford Station Way.
data.description: Floor & Decor (NYSE: FND), a prominent retailer specializing in hard-surface flooring for both homeowners and professionals, recently launched a new warehouse store and design center in Winston-Salem, NC, at 3925 Oxford Station Way, zip 27103. The opening saw the employment of around 35 full-time and 15 part-time staff members. Selena Sykes takes charge as the Chief Executive Merchant of the store.

data.title: Synevit promotes Neurocomplex B for seasonal depression during colder weather months. FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., Oct. 3, 2025.
data.description: A recent report highlighted the benefits of Vitamin B in managing seasonal depression effectively. Combining these vitamins, such as in the case of Neurocomplex B, is crucial for improved absorption. Synevit, based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, is advocating for its Neurocomplex B® formula as a vital source of nutrients leading into the future. This news was disclosed on October 3, 2025, according to PRNewswire. The promotion emphasizes the significance of this formulation for mental wellness, with the potential to aid individuals dealing with seasonal depression.

data.title: Pacer reaches milestone with 200th Hyatt hotel opening. Collaboration with Hyatt key in streamlining processes.
data.description: In Wayne, Pennsylvania on October 3, 2025, Pacer, a prominent project intelligence solution, celebrates a significant accomplishment by assisting in the successful launch of 200 Hyatt hotels. The partnership between Pacer and Hyatt has greatly improved efficiency by streamlining operations...

data.title: Investors can contact Wolf Haldenstein regarding a securities class action lawsuit against Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTNT).
data.description: On October 3, 2025, legal firm Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP issued a reminder to investors regarding a securities class action lawsuit against Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTNT). Investors were encouraged to join the case and provide their contact information.

data.title: Canadian detergent brand Leaf & Mineral is entering the U.S. market, set to reach shelves and e-commerce queues.
data.description: A groundbreaking detergent label from Canada is making its debut in the United States, set to hit shelves and online platforms soon. Leaf & Mineral, which has been making waves in Canada for years, is known for its innovative range of laundry and dish soaps. The launch is set to take place in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on October 3, 2025. Stay tuned for this exciting expansion as the brand gears up to capture the market with its unique products.

data.title: Vision Films will release 'Beneath The Light', a psychological thriller, on Oct 14, 2025, for North American VOD.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Vision Films Inc. shared that the psychological thriller film "Beneath The Light" by John Baumgartner will be available for North American Transactional Video on Demand starting October 14, 2025. This feature-length movie is set to release simultaneously on various platforms.

data.title: Midnight Sun increases LIFE offering to C$17.5 million through "bought deal" and private placement.
data.description: The information provided is not intended for distribution to United States newswire services or for dissemination within the United States.

data.title: Flagstar Financial, Inc. will report Q3 2025 earnings on Oct. 24th, results for FY ending Sept 30th.
data.description: In Hicksville, New York on October 3, 2025, Flagstar Financial, Inc. (NYSE: FLG) revealed its intention to release financial results for the three and nine months concluding on September 30, 2025, at around 6:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET) on Friday, October 24, 2025. The Company is set to announce the earnings for this period.

data.title: Bitcoin surpasses $120,000 as October starts with a bang. Major banks predict even higher targets, setting up a big Q4.
data.description: Several large banks are predicting significantly higher price targets for Bitcoin, indicating the potential for a booming fourth quarter.

data.title: Jayud Global Logistics in Shenzhen announces 1-for-50 reverse stock split; trading to start on adjusted basis on Oct 13.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on Oct. 03, 2025, Jayud Global Logistics Limited (NASDAQ: JYD) disclosed plans for a reverse share split, with a ratio of 1-for-50, and an increase in authorized share capital. The board approved these actions on September 9, 2025. Following the split, the Company's Class A ordinary shares will trade on an adjusted basis starting Oct. 13, 2025, under the ticker symbol "JYD." The new CUSIP number for the shares will be G5084H111. Jayud is a prominent supply chain solution provider based in Shenzhen, specializing in cross-border logistics.

data.title: McCormick to report Q3 earnings on Oct. 7, analysts expect 82 cents/share, $1.71 billion revenue. Dividend yield at 2.64%, $500 monthly target mentioned.
data.description: McCormick & Company, Inc. (NYSE: MKC) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens on Tuesday, October 7. Analysts are predicting the company to post earnings of 82 cents per share for this quarter, a slight drop from the 83 cents per share reported in the same period last year. The company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $1.71 billion, up from $1.68 billion in the previous year. McCormick's current annual dividend yield stands at 2.64%, with dividends of 45 cents per share quarterly and $1.80 annually. Investors may be considering potential returns from these dividends. For those aiming to earn $500 monthly from McCormick, they would need to target a yearly income of $6,000. This information and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SSFF & ASIA 2025 to host AI International Conference in Tokyo; key figures from 6 countries to attend.
data.description: High-profile figures in the film industry from various countries including Germany, Senegal, Mexico, Iran, and Japan, gathered in Tokyo on October 3, 2025. Among them were a former Warner Bros. Strategic Advisor, former Chair of France National Film Center, Director of the Bucheon International Fantastic Film Festival, and prominent AI Filmmakers. This meeting is significant as it brings together key players in the global film scene. The event, which was recognized by the U.S., underscores the importance of international collaboration within the industry.

data.title: Hanbat National University researchers in South Korea demonstrate cobalt exsolution in solid oxide fuel cell cathodes to boost performance, offering a new research direction. (Characters: 135)
data.description: A recent study conducted in Chungcheong Province, South Korea, showcased the exsolution of cobalt in solid oxide fuel cell cathodes under oxidizing atmospheres. This discovery marks a significant advancement in fuel cell technology research. The findings suggest a promising new direction for fuel cells, offering a clean and efficient alternative to traditional energy sources. This breakthrough could potentially revolutionize the industry, with experts predicting a considerable impact on the field of fuel cell research. This development is a promising step towards enhancing the performance and sustainability of fuel cells, potentially leading to a more environmentally friendly energy solution.

data.title: Advantage Lumber LLC is the first certified ThermoWood® distributor in the US, part of ITWA. Oct. 3, 2025.
data.description: In Sarasota, Florida on October 3, 2025, Advantage Lumber LLC revealed its status as the initial certified cooperative partner of the International ThermoWood Association (ITWA) in the U.S. This signifies a significant milestone for the company, known for its innovation in the lumber sector.

data.title: Data breach at Allianz Life Insurance Company; Wolf Haldenstein investigating claims for impacted individuals.
data.description: To participate in the ongoing investigation, individuals impacted by certain circumstances can submit their contact details by clicking on the provided link. Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP, a leading national law firm specializing in consumer rights, is currently looking into cases related to individuals affected by the situation. The investigation, conducted in New York and Chicago, commenced on October 3, 2025. If you have been impacted and wish to be represented, please provide your details via the specified link.

data.title: Zeta Global announces The Chainsmokers joining Zeta Live 2025 for conversation on AI, music, culture.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Zeta Global revealed that the Grammy-Award winning duo, The Chainsmokers, will be participating in Zeta Live 2025. During the event, they will engage in an on-stage conversation focusing on AI, music, and culture. This collaboration is expected to draw significant attention, given the widespread popularity of The Chainsmokers in the music industry. The event is set to provide unique insights into the intersection of technology, art, and entertainment.
